bucket_summary.title: Brute force severity too high
bucket_summary.diagnosis: Medium brute-force indicators are labelled correctly but escalated to high.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add medium brute-force positives with repeated failures but limited blast radius, no admin compromise evidence, and no distributed spray.

bucket_summary.title: Evidence miss
bucket_summary.diagnosis: The label is correct, but evidence is incomplete or does not match the expected substring.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Keep exact evidence substrings short and copied from the log line.

bucket_summary.title: Normal -> brute force
bucket_summary.diagnosis: Single or low-volume auth failures are over-escalated into brute force.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add normal auth negatives with failures=1-2, no burst window, no repeated source, and no account lockout.

bucket_summary.title: Normal -> SQLi
bucket_summary.diagnosis: Benign text containing words like union or SQL training vocabulary is over-alerted.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add benign documentation/search examples containing SQL words without quote, comment, tautology, stacked query, or blocked WAF evidence.

bucket_summary.title: Normal -> traversal
bucket_summary.diagnosis: Normalized relative paths under allowed docs/static routes are over-alerted.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add normal normalized-path examples where the route is documentation/static content, status is successful, and no sensitive file target is present.

bucket_summary.title: Port/recon severity too low
bucket_summary.diagnosis: Clear nmap/SYN/horizontal scan indicators are labelled correctly but lowered to medium.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add high-severity recon positives with explicit nmap/SYN scan or broad host/port enumeration.

dataset_implications.details: Repair normal -> brute force, SQLi, and traversal false positives without touching fixed test.

dataset_implications.target: medium brute-force and high recon positives
dataset_implications.details: Teach severity boundaries while keeping labels unchanged.
Prevent the normal repair from causing a return to suspicious -> normal collapse.
